info.name: Layra bundled infra icons
info.note: Curated AWS-architecture + cloud/dev infra glyphs (80+). Monochrome marks carry an AWS service category (compute/storage/database/network/security/integration/analytics/management) rendered as a colored service tile; logos:* keep full-color brand palettes.
